As I mentioned earlier, we are in Kali Yuga and Kali Yuga is, of all the four ages, is the most degraded and we can see the symptoms, in fact the symptoms are mentioned in the Srimad Bhagavatam and which are very much visible to us in present times.

There's a lot of fights happening, lots of wars happening, a lot of confusion, lot of quarrels happening. Meat eating is rampant, intoxication, gambling, illicit sex, extra marital affairs, live-in relationships.
What was not so common, what was unheard of maybe 20 years back, has become very common.
So, as devotees of the Lord, yes, we have a duty to see how we can reach this message,
distribute the holy name to people.
It's our duty, it's Prabhupada's mission, we are part of that mission.
But Chaitanya Mahaprabhu says, janma sarthaka kari karopakaar.
First we have to protect ourselves.
First we have to realize that yes, Kali Yuga is at its full force and things are degrading.
We have to protect ourselves, we have to insulate ourselves.
Like in the flight also, when you travel, they say that the oxygen thing will, the oxygen
mask will fall down from the top.
Before helping others, kindly put the mask.
So we have to help ourselves, we have to protect ourselves, insulate ourselves from the ill
effects of Kali Yuga and try our best, whatever we can, to help others.
Janma Sarthaka Kari Karopakaar.
